utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format lists six items: property, financing, legal_services, moving_services, setup_services, and total_budget. The final property solution includes all six of these items. Each item is fully detailed: the property includes name, address, type, features, and price; financing includes method, source, mortgage, and terms; legal_services lists package, cost, scope, and status; moving_services includes provider, cost, and included tasks; setup_services covers utilities, community package, and cost; total_budget shows all cost breakdowns. Therefore, all six required items are present and fully specified.
